extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked with ~10km to go on the final climb, dropped YATES by 41 seconds and HINDLEY by 53 seconds to win Stage 7
tactical_patterns: Vingegaard's acceleration caught O'Connor completely by surprise despite O'Connor being high on GC, revealing positioning vulnerability.
Hindley rode away from O'Connor in final kilometer, showing superior finishing speed on steep gradient kick.
Campenaerts rode solo without bottles to maximize efficiency hunting KOM points, collecting 30 total points from breakaway.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: second stage win of the race, dropped all GC rivals with single acceleration at 10km to go
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: had no answer to Vingegaard's attack, looked around helplessly and lost 41 seconds
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: rode away from O'Connor in final 500m when gradient kicked up, showing superior steep-gradient form
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: caught by surprise by acceleration, hanging on for dear life, lost 1:05 and podium place to Hindley
rider_signals.GAUDU David: negative: dropped from third to seventh overall, completely unable to follow decisive acceleration
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: solo breakaway hunting KOM points, rode without bottles for efficiency, secured 30 points total
